prompts.name: list-repositories
prompts.expected_behavior: Search github.com operations, describe the selected repository listing operation, and execute through the integration capability.

prompts.name: create-issue
prompts.prompt: Create an issue in owner/repo titled Bug report.
prompts.expected_behavior: Use github.com integration operation discovery and execution. Do not ask for token ids.

prompts.name: update-file-pr
prompts.prompt: Update README.md in owner/repo and open a pull request.
prompts.expected_behavior: Read current file/repo state, create or use a branch, write through the integration, and create a pull request.
